body:
Adds two new constructors for `BucketModelParameters`:
```julia
bucket_parameters = BucketModelParameters(FT; albedo, z_0m, z_0b, τc)
bucket_parameters = BucketModelParameters(toml_dict; albedo, z_0m, z_0b, τc)
```

This PR also updates the compat and Manifests for ClimaParams to 0.10.2. The newest release will be needed for the remaining parameter struct PRs.
title: Refactor bucket parameters
